name: harness
description: Multi-agent sprint orchestration harness with two-plugin architecture: domain-blind core and pluggable domain skill suites.

interface.longDescription: Runs an Anthropic-style application harness with 6 agents: initializer, planner, generator, evaluator, coordinator, and releaser. Domain-blind core with pluggable domain skill suites. Includes the SDLC suite for software, architecture, business analysis, solution architecture, and ops profiles.
defaultPrompt: Build an app using the harness.
Review whether this harness really followed the sprint plan.
Run continuous multi-agent app delivery until done.
